# SERP Strategists - AI Growth Operator

> SERP Strategists is an AI Growth Operator that continuously audits, fixes, publishes, and monitors organic search and AI search visibility — without agency overhead. Built for founders and small teams.

## What we do

- Crawls websites and detects SEO issue types automatically
- Prepares technical SEO fixes with approval gates, logs, and rollback-aware workflows
- Supports GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) for visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews
- Prepares content actions targeting verified query and content gaps
- Tracks rankings, organic traffic, and AI citations over time
- Connects shipped work to measurement windows so recommendations can improve

## Who we serve

Founders, developers, and small teams who want execution without agency overhead.

## Pricing and availability

Last updated: July 17, 2026

- **Audit**: $0 — one submitted website, technical SEO and GEO readiness review, impact-ranked opportunity queue, no automated fixes
- **Growth**: $49/month early-access target — one connected site, approval-gated execution, up to 4 content actions per month
- **Scale**: $99/month early-access target — up to 3 connected sites, AI citation monitoring, up to 12 content actions per month

The free audit is available now. Growth and Scale are early-access target prices for approved accounts. Joining early access does not start a subscription or charge a card. Final scope, activation date, limits, and billing start are confirmed before activation. No paid-plan trial, annual discount, or automatic overage pricing is currently published.
